headline: Will Economic Development Accelerate PPL's Long-Term Earnings Growth?
summary: PPL's economic growth prospects benefit from rising data center and industrial demand, higher infrastructure spending and long-term earnings visibility.

headline: PPL vs. CMS: Which Regulated Utility Stock is the Smarter Investment?
summary: CMS edges PPL on ROE, capital investment plans and six-month share gains, while both utilities invest in grid upgrades and clean energy.

raw.headline: PPL vs. CMS: Which Regulated Utility Stock is the Smarter Investment?

headline: Ken Hartwick, former Ontario Power Generation CEO, to join PPL Board of Directors
summary: PPL Corporation (NYSE: PPL) today announced that Kenneth M. Hartwick, a veteran energy industry executive, will join its Board of Directors, effective July 1, 2026. He will serve on the People and Compensation Committee and Finance Committee of the Board. With Hartwick's appointment, PPL's board continues to reflect a broad mix of skills and experiences aligned with the company's strategic priorities.
